## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] No secrets or environment values in code
- [ ] Reviewed across five axes: correctness, readability, architecture, security, performance

## Five-axis self-review

| Axis         | Notes |
| ------------ | ----- |
| Correctness  |       |
| Readability  |       |
| Architecture |       |
| Security     |       |
| Performance  |       |
